summary: Iteration 3: P1 Refactor Regression Testing - All refactored components working correctly. Tested HR module (LeavesTab.tsx, PayrollTab.tsx, StatsTab.tsx, LeaveRequestModal.tsx, PayrollGenerateModal.tsx) and Sales module (SignatureModal.tsx). All tabs render properly, modals open/close correctly, and CRUD operations work. Public signature flows (/sign-quote/:id, /sign-contract/:id) remain accessible.
critical_code_review_comments: Refactor completed successfully - all extracted components receive props correctly from parent
LeavesTab.tsx: Renders leave requests table with 'Gérer' popover (Approve/Reject/Pending/Delete actions)
PayrollTab.tsx: Renders payslips table with download PDF, toggle status, delete actions
StatsTab.tsx: Renders 4 stats cards (Total Effectif, Congés en Cours, Masse Salariale, Unités Actives)
LeaveRequestModal.tsx: Opens correctly with employee select, type, date range, reason fields
PayrollGenerateModal.tsx: Opens correctly with month/year selection and employee count
SignatureModal.tsx: Opens correctly with quote summary, signature canvas, and 'Valider le Devis' button
All state and handlers remain in parent components (HR.tsx, Sales.tsx) - sub-components are pure presentational
seed_data_creation: Created test quote DEV-2026-208 for signature modal testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: P1 refactor regression testing complete. All extracted sub-components from HR.tsx and Sales.tsx are working correctly. The refactor was purely structural - no behavior changes. HR module has 6 tabs (Annuaire, Contrats, Congés, Paie, Analyses, Tâches) all working. Sales module has filter tabs (Tous, Factures, Devis) and quote sub-tabs (Liste, Modèles, Signés/Réception) all working. Public signature pages (/sign-quote/:id, /sign-contract/:id) accessible and showing proper error messages for invalid IDs.
